heading: View MongoDB Search Indexes
body:
To vew your MongoDB Search indexes on a collection using MongoDB Compass:

Open [Compass](https://www.mongodb.com/try/download/compass) and connect to your cluster. For
detailed instructions, see [Compass](atlas-connect-via-compass).

On the Database screen, click the sample\_mflix database, then click the movies collection.

The page displays the following:

| Column Name     | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| --------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Name and Fields | Name of the index and and the name of the indexed fields.                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Type            | Type of index. Value can be Search or Vector Search.                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| Status          | Status of the index. To learn more, see MongoDB Search Index Statuses.                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Actions         | Actions you can perform on the index when you hover over the index. You can take the following actions:Aggregate - to switch to the Aggregations tab to run queries using the index. - to edit the index in raw JSON (Javascript Object Notation) format. - to delete the index. |
